results.name: mathd_numbertheory_764
results.statement:
definition inv_mod::"nat \<Rightarrow> nat \<Rightarrow> nat" where
  "inv_mod d p = (SOME x. [x*d = 1] (mod p))"
theorem mathd_numbertheory_764:
  fixes p :: nat
  assumes "prime p"
  and "7 \<le> p" 
shows "[(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p) = 2] (mod p)"
results.proof:
theorem mathd_numbertheory_764:
  fixes p :: nat
  assumes "prime p" and "7 \<le> p" 
  shows "[(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p) = 2] (mod p)"
proof -
  let ?f = "\<lambda>k. int (inv_mod k p)"
  let ?S = "(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p)"
  (* termwise congruence over int *)
  have step: "\<And>k. k \<in> {1..<p-1} \<Longrightarrow> [?f k * ?f (k+1) = ?f k - ?f (k+1)] (mod int p)"
  proof -
    fix k assume "k \<in> {1..<p-1}"
    hence "1 \<le> k" "k < p-1" by auto
    thus "[?f k * ?f (k+1) = ?f k - ?f (k+1)] (mod int p)"
      using telescope_step[OF assms(1) assms(2)] by blast
  qed
  have sum1: "[(\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k * ?f (k+1)) = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k - ?f (k+1))] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_sum step)
  have sum2: "(\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k - ?f (k+1)) = ?f 1 - ?f (p-1)"
    using tele_sum[of 1 "p-1" ?f] assms(2) by simp
  (* int of the nat sum equals sum of int products *)
  have intS: "int ?S = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k * ?f (k+1))"
    by simp
  have congA: "[int ?S = ?f 1 - ?f (p-1)] (mod int p)"
    using sum1 sum2 intS by simp
  have congB: "[?f 1 - ?f (p-1) = 1 - (- 1)] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_diff inv_one[OF assms(1)] inv_pm1[OF assms(1) assms(2)])
  have "[int ?S = 1 - (- 1)] (mod int p)" using congA congB cong_trans by blast
  hence "[int ?S = int 2] (mod int p)" by simp
  hence "[?S = 2] (mod p)" using cong_int_iff by blast
  thus ?thesis .
qed
results.source:
theory mathd_numbertheory_764 imports Complex_Main "HOL-Computational_Algebra.Computational_Algebra" "HOL-Number_Theory.Number_Theory" begin
definition inv_mod::"nat \<Rightarrow> nat \<Rightarrow> nat" where
  "inv_mod d p = (SOME x. [x*d = 1] (mod p))"
thm cong_solve_coprime_nat
lemma helper_cop:
  assumes "prime p" "\<not> p dvd d"
  shows "coprime (d::nat) p"
  using assms prime_imp_coprime[of p d] coprime_commute by blast

lemma inv_mod_exists:
  fixes p d :: nat
  assumes "prime p" "\<not> p dvd d"
  shows "\<exists>x. [x*d = 1] (mod p)"
proof -
  have c: "coprime (d::nat) p" using assms helper_cop by blast
  have "p > 1" using assms(1) prime_gt_1_nat by blast
  then obtain x where "[d * x = 1] (mod p)"
    using c cong_solve_coprime_nat[of d] by auto
  thus ?thesis by (metis mult.commute)
qed
lemma inv_mod_works:
  fixes p d :: nat
  assumes "prime p" "\<not> p dvd d"
  shows "[inv_mod d p * d = 1] (mod p)"
  unfolding inv_mod_def
  by (rule someI_ex[OF inv_mod_exists[OF assms]])
lemma kbound:
  fixes p k :: nat
  assumes "7 \<le> p" and "1 \<le> k" and "k < p - 1"
  shows "\<not> p dvd k \<and> \<not> p dvd (k+1)"
proof
  have "k < p" using assms by linarith
  thus "\<not> p dvd k" using assms by (simp add: nat_dvd_not_less)
next
  have "k + 1 < p" using assms by linarith
  thus "\<not> p dvd (k+1)" by (simp add: nat_dvd_not_less)
qed
lemma inv_mod_works_int:
  fixes p d :: nat
  assumes "prime p" "\<not> p dvd d"
  shows "[int (inv_mod d p) * int d = 1] (mod (int p))"
proof -
  have "[inv_mod d p * d = 1] (mod p)" using inv_mod_works[OF assms] .
  hence "[int (inv_mod d p * d) = int 1] (mod (int p))" using cong_int_iff by blast
  thus ?thesis by simp
qed
lemma cop_kk1:
  fixes p k :: nat
  assumes "\<not> p dvd (k+1)" "prime p"
  shows "coprime (int k + 1) (int p)"
proof -
  have "coprime (int (k+1)) (int p)" using helper_cop[OF assms(2) assms(1)] coprime_int_iff by blast
  thus ?thesis by (simp add: add.commute)
qed
lemma telescope_step:
  fixes p k :: nat
  assumes p: "prime p" and p7: "7 \<le> p" and k1: "1 \<le> k" and kp: "k < p - 1"
  shows "[int (inv_mod k p) * int (inv_mod (k+1) p) = int (inv_mod k p) - int (inv_mod (k+1) p)] (mod (int p))"
proof -
  have nd: "\<not> p dvd k" "\<not> p dvd (k+1)" using kbound[OF p7 k1 kp] by auto
  define a where "a = int (inv_mod k p)"
  define b where "b = int (inv_mod (k+1) p)"
  define K where "K = int k"
  have ak: "[a * K = 1] (mod int p)" unfolding a_def K_def using inv_mod_works_int[OF p nd(1)] .
  have bk: "[b * (K+1) = 1] (mod int p)" unfolding b_def K_def 
    using inv_mod_works_int[OF p nd(2)] by (simp add: add.commute)
  have e1: "[(a*b - (a - b)) * (K * (K+1)) = (a*K)*(b*(K+1)) - (a*K)*(K+1) + (b*(K+1))*K] (mod int p)"
    by (simp add: algebra_simps cong_refl)
  have e2: "[(a*K)*(b*(K+1)) - (a*K)*(K+1) + (b*(K+1))*K = 1*1 - 1*(K+1) + 1*K] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_add cong_diff cong_mult ak bk cong_refl)
  have e3: "(1::int)*1 - 1*(K+1) + 1*K = 0" by simp
  have z: "[(a*b - (a - b)) * (K * (K+1)) = 0] (mod int p)"
    using cong_trans[OF e1 e2] e3 by simp
  have cop: "coprime (K * (K+1)) (int p)"
  proof -
    have c1: "coprime K (int p)" unfolding K_def using helper_cop[OF p nd(1)] by (simp add: coprime_int_iff)
    have c2: "coprime (K+1) (int p)" unfolding K_def using cop_kk1[OF nd(2) p] .
    show ?thesis using c1 c2 coprime_mult_left_iff by blast
  qed
  have "int p dvd (a*b - (a-b)) * (K * (K+1))" using z cong_0_iff by blast
  hence "int p dvd (a*b - (a-b))" using cop by (simp add: coprime_dvd_mult_left_iff coprime_commute)
  hence "[a*b - (a-b) = 0] (mod int p)" using cong_0_iff by blast
  thus ?thesis unfolding a_def b_def by (metis cong_diff_iff_cong_0 cong_sym)
qed
lemma tele_sum:
  fixes f :: "nat \<Rightarrow> int" and m n :: nat
  assumes "m \<le> n"
  shows "(\<Sum>k\<in>{m..<n}. f k - f (k+1)) = f m - f n"
  using assms
proof (induct n)
  case 0 thus ?case by simp
next
  case (Suc n)
  show ?case
  proof (cases "m \<le> n")
    case True
    have "{m..<Suc n} = insert n {m..<n}" using True by auto
    hence "(\<Sum>k\<in>{m..<Suc n}. f k - f (k+1)) = (f n - f (n+1)) + (\<Sum>k\<in>{m..<n}. f k - f (k+1))"
      by simp
    also have "... = (f n - f (n+1)) + (f m - f n)" using Suc(1)[OF True] by simp
    finally show ?thesis by simp
  next
    case False
    with Suc(2) have "m = Suc n" by simp
    thus ?thesis by simp
  qed
qed
lemma inv_one:
  fixes p :: nat assumes "prime p"
  shows "[int (inv_mod 1 p) = 1] (mod int p)"
proof -
  have "p > 1" using assms prime_gt_1_nat by blast
  hence nd: "\<not> p dvd (1::nat)" by (simp add: nat_dvd_not_less)
  have "[int (inv_mod 1 p) * int 1 = 1] (mod int p)" using inv_mod_works_int[OF assms nd] .
  thus ?thesis by simp
qed
lemma inv_pm1:
  fixes p :: nat assumes "prime p" "7 \<le> p"
  shows "[int (inv_mod (p-1) p) = - 1] (mod int p)"
proof -
  have pos: "0 < p - 1" using assms(2) by linarith
  have lt: "p - 1 < p" using assms(2) by linarith
  have nd: "\<not> p dvd (p-1)" using pos lt nat_dvd_not_less by blast
  have w: "[int (inv_mod (p-1) p) * int (p-1) = 1] (mod int p)" using inv_mod_works_int[OF assms(1) nd] .
  have eq: "int (p-1) = int p - 1" using assms(2) by simp
  define c where "c = int (inv_mod (p-1) p)"
  from w eq have w2: "[c * (int p - 1) = 1] (mod int p)" by (simp add: c_def)
  have "[c * (int p - 1) = c * (0 - 1)] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_mult cong_refl cong_diff) (auto simp: cong_def)
  hence "[c * (0 - 1) = 1] (mod int p)" using w2 cong_trans cong_sym by blast
  hence "[- c = 1] (mod int p)" by simp
  thus ?thesis unfolding c_def by (metis cong_minus_minus_iff minus_minus)
qed
theorem mathd_numbertheory_764:
  fixes p :: nat
  assumes "prime p" and "7 \<le> p" 
  shows "[(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p) = 2] (mod p)"
proof -
  let ?f = "\<lambda>k. int (inv_mod k p)"
  let ?S = "(\<Sum> k \<in> {1..<p-1}. inv_mod k p * inv_mod (k+1) p)"
  (* termwise congruence over int *)
  have step: "\<And>k. k \<in> {1..<p-1} \<Longrightarrow> [?f k * ?f (k+1) = ?f k - ?f (k+1)] (mod int p)"
  proof -
    fix k assume "k \<in> {1..<p-1}"
    hence "1 \<le> k" "k < p-1" by auto
    thus "[?f k * ?f (k+1) = ?f k - ?f (k+1)] (mod int p)"
      using telescope_step[OF assms(1) assms(2)] by blast
  qed
  have sum1: "[(\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k * ?f (k+1)) = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k - ?f (k+1))] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_sum step)
  have sum2: "(\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k - ?f (k+1)) = ?f 1 - ?f (p-1)"
    using tele_sum[of 1 "p-1" ?f] assms(2) by simp
  (* int of the nat sum equals sum of int products *)
  have intS: "int ?S = (\<Sum>k\<in>{1..<p-1}. ?f k * ?f (k+1))"
    by simp
  have congA: "[int ?S = ?f 1 - ?f (p-1)] (mod int p)"
    using sum1 sum2 intS by simp
  have congB: "[?f 1 - ?f (p-1) = 1 - (- 1)] (mod int p)"
    by (intro cong_diff inv_one[OF assms(1)] inv_pm1[OF assms(1) assms(2)])
  have "[int ?S = 1 - (- 1)] (mod int p)" using congA congB cong_trans by blast
  hence "[int ?S = int 2] (mod int p)" by simp
  hence "[?S = 2] (mod p)" using cong_int_iff by blast
  thus ?thesis .
qed
